summary.notes: Architecture covers all MVP features, API surface, and constraints. A few product-tuning items are client-policy defaults or worker config and are called out below.

acceptance_check.item: User can start a habit session and receive a session_id
Floor reached posts award 1 token and triggers haptic/visual feedback
acceptance_check.by: /api/v1/sessions/{id}/floor_reached + rewards service (server), haptic/visual is client UI

acceptance_check.item: Continue prompt shown at floor; user can proceed to target or stop
Session complete summarizes floor/target and score impact
DND is enabled during floor phase when supported
acceptance_check.by: Client DND prompt; server returns dnd_request flag on /sessions/start

acceptance_check.item: Server is source of truth for timestamps to handle clock skew
acceptance_check.by: Server timestamps canonical; client_clock_skew_ms stored; session_events capture client_ts

acceptance_check.item: Default quiet hours set to 22:00-07:00; user can adjust
No nudges or prompts during quiet hours
Late-night salvage protections applied; nighttime salvage rate stays under 5% KPI
acceptance_check.by: Follow-up: enforce server-side gating of token award during quiet hours or flag for weekly review in worker

acceptance_check.item: DND integrations attempt enablement at session start; fallback to respectful prompt
acceptance_check.by: Client DND prompt using dnd_request flag

followups: Implement a server policy hook in floor_reached to gate or flag awards during quiet hours; configurable via ENV (QUIET_HOURS_AWARD_POLICY=gate|flag).

acceptance_check.item: Proofs default to self_attest; stronger proofs are opt-in with explicit consent
Photo proofs store only hashes locally; no image uploads without consent
acceptance_check.by: No server endpoints for images; validation section forbids uploads

acceptance_check.item: Proof retention is capped at 24-72 hours and auto-deletes
acceptance_check.by: Client policy; server hints via users.proofs_retention_hours

acceptance_check.item: Privacy settings enforce denials by default for unknown actions
Users can create habits with cadence and timing presets
System enforces max_active_habits=3 by default
Habits have floor/target/stretch timing and per-habit proof mode
GET suggestions returns EMA-based floor adjustment proposal with effective_date
Nightly job evaluates floor adjustments with raise/lower thresholds
Never raises floor above 80% of target and respects cooldowns
Adjustments logged to floor_history with emaSnapshot
Automated changes are reversible via weekly review
acceptance_check.by: floor_history audit trail; client/admin weekly review flow

acceptance_check.item: Floor awards deterministic token increments with capacity limits
Cosmetic/story unlocks are triggered predictably based on token counts
No lootbox or randomized paid mechanics affecting score
acceptance_check.by: Policy: no randomness; no monetization hooks in rewards

acceptance_check.item: Quiet periods can accrue invisible tokens without UI spam
acceptance_check.by: Client UX choice; server supports accrual quietly

acceptance_check.item: Client queues events offline and syncs when online
Conflicts resolved using merge/keep_both rules for overlapping sessions
Batch sync endpoint accepts multiple client events and returns per-event results
Idempotent deduplication by session_id on server
Nudges only shown when heat is within 0.2-0.7
acceptance_check.by: Client policy; server can expose heat hints later

acceptance_check.item: Respects DND, calendar busy status, and per-habit nudge frequency caps
acceptance_check.by: Client integration; server privacy middleware for quiet hours

acceptance_check.item: Messages are gentle and competence-reinforcing
Disabled during quiet hours by policy

followups: Add mobile-side stories/tasks for calendar-busy signal ingestion and per-habit nudge caps.

acceptance_check.item: Avatar selection, 1-3 habits chosen, quiet hours set
Preset selection with optional review & edit
Try it now launches a 60s floor session and awards 1 token on completion
acceptance_check.by: Client default; server supports 60s floor and token award

acceptance_check.item: Flow target duration 75-85 seconds for a typical user
acceptance_check.by: FOLLOW-UP: set mobile default target_seconds=80-85 (currently examples show 90)

followups: Adjust mobile default target_seconds to 80-85 in onboarding presets.

acceptance_check.item: Concurrent sessions for same habit are accepted and flagged for review
Server timestamp is canonical; client durations adjusted for skew
30s heartbeat maintains active session; idle >5m considered inactive
User warning when another device has an active session
acceptance_check.by: API returns active-session indicator; client shows warning

enforced_by: Mobile clients process proofs; server stores none
Client retention policy; server hint via users.proofs_retention_hours
No monetization hooks in rewards logic
No image upload endpoints; policy explicitly forbids it
Client no-nudge + planned server award gating during quiet hours

recommended_changes.change: Gate token awards during quiet hours or mark as salvage and exclude from KPIs
Set default target_seconds to 80-85 to meet acceptance window
Expose thresholds and cooldown via ENV
